docs.title: Project Context
docs.subtitle: Markdown files discovered under specs/, docs/, and insights/ in the cloned repo. Attach them to agents or skills as steering context for reviews.
docs.docCount: {count, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} discovered

empty.title: No context documents found
empty.body: Add markdown files under a specs/, docs/, or insights/ folder in your repository. They will appear here and can be attached to agents and skills.

empty.title: No spec files yet
empty.body: Drop your PRDs, tech specs, and acceptance criteria under .devdigest/specs/. Every agent and the PR brief read them as grounding context.
